claims.excerpt: Management stated that they **expect the company to be cash-flow positive in 2026 and onward**, with **revenues exceeding costs** so the business becomes **self-sustaining** (no reliance on treasury interest alone to cover overhead).

**Reconciliation to filings (as of H1 2025):** Semi-annual report shows H1 2025 net loss **($51,156)** and lease income **$189,101** vs **$149,310** prior-year period. Forward claim is **unverified** in filed financials until FY2026 reporting.
**Falsifier:** FY2026 semi-annual or annual still shows operating loss excluding one-time items.
- Copperwood production start date (refer to Highland Copper public disclosures)
- Copperwood production start date (refer to Highland Copper public disclosures)
